## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test:unit`

## Documentation

- [ ] README / README-EN updated
- [ ] Website docs updated
- [ ] CLI / MCP / HTTP reference updated
- [ ] Not needed

## DevMesh Knowledge

- [ ] Captured durable project knowledge when useful
- [ ] No durable knowledge to capture

## Screenshots Or Output

<!-- Add screenshots for UI/TUI/website changes, or terminal output for CLI changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I checked `git diff --check`.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, local runtime state, generated indexes, or unrelated files.
- [ ] I kept `.dev-mesh` changes limited to shareable project knowledge.
